overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} \text {hypothesis H_{1} :} & u (n) = s (n) + \nu (n), n = 1, 2, \ldots , M; \\ \text {hypothesis H_{0} :} & u (n) = \nu (n), n = 1, 2, \ldots , M. \end{array}
